steps.title: Distribute 3 across the parentheses
steps.content:
Multiply 3 by each term inside the parentheses:

$$3(x + 5) - 6 = 3 \cdot x + 3 \cdot 5 - 6 = 3x + 15 - 6$$

steps.title: Combine constant terms
steps.content:
Combine the numbers 15 and -6:

$$3x + 15 - 6 = 3x + 9$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
